大发稳定回本计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238163227_62105174<br>vk.com/topic-238135598_61146267<br>vk.com/topic-238507320_61766329<br>vk.com/topic-238394877_62105199<br>vk.com/topic-238539930_61766346<br>vk.com/topic-238552411_62290323<br>vk.com/topic-238581034_60674474<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62290336<br>vk.com/topic-238126735_60564762<br>vk.com/topic-238580010_61766380<br>vk.com/topic-238580497_62105216<br>vk.com/topic-237864373_60914934<br>vk.com/topic-238135101_62290354<br>vk.com/topic-238581400_61766399<br>vk.com/topic-238126536_61011372<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60674528<br>vk.com/topic-238135597_62105252<br>vk.com/topic-238394666_61011388<br>vk.com/topic-238522435_60564799<br>vk.com/topic-238581192_61259133<br>vk.com/topic-238163166_61011387<br>vk.com/topic-238539367_62105285<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61766431<br>vk.com/topic-238100039_61446455<br>vk.com/topic-238580093_60914981<br>vk.com/topic-238163198_61146416<br>vk.com/topic-238550546_61011449<br>vk.com/topic-238539362_61259200<br>vk.com/topic-238541588_61146414<br>vk.com/topic-238570067_62105342<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60915022<br>vk.com/topic-238579994_60674603<br>vk.com/topic-238264836_61011465<br>vk.com/topi
